summary: A comprehensive health insurance plan designed to cover you and your loved ones at every stage of life with coverage ranging from ₹50 lacs up to ₹3 crores, featuring unlimited restoration, guaranteed cumulative bonus, and worldwide medical emergency coverage.
coverage: Inpatient Hospitalization for more than 24 hours
Maternity Expenses up to ₹1 Lac for up to 2 deliveries
waiting_periods: First 30 days waiting period for all illnesses other than accidents
24 months waiting period for specific ailments
Pre-existing diseases not covered for 24 months
90 days waiting period and 30 days survival period for Critical Illness Add-on cover
room_rent: Pick any Room Category including Suite for Sum Insured ₹3 crores
Any room category coverage available with Health 360 Advance package
claims_information: 100% Restoration of Sum Insured for multiple hospitalizations for unrelated illnesses
Guaranteed Cumulative Bonus of 15% of India coverage Sum Insured each policy year irrespective of claims
No maximum limit on cumulative bonus accumulation
Premium waiver for one full year upon occurrence of listed contingencies to policyholder
exclusions: Any illness resulting from the Insured committing any breach of law
Contamination from Nuclear fuel or radiation
Expenses arising from war, war like situations

faqs.question: What is the coverage amount available under ManipalCigna Lifetime Health India Plan?
faqs.answer: The plan offers comprehensive coverage from ₹50 lacs up to ₹3 crores.

faqs.question: What is the restoration benefit available?
faqs.answer: Unlimited restoration up to 100% of Sum Insured for multiple hospitalizations for unrelated illnesses in a policy year.

faqs.question: What is the guaranteed cumulative bonus?
faqs.answer: You earn a guaranteed cumulative bonus of 15% of your India coverage Sum Insured each policy year, irrespective of claims, with no capping on accumulation.

faqs.question: What is the waiting period for illnesses?
faqs.answer: First 30 days waiting period is applicable for all illnesses other than accidents.

faqs.question: What is the waiting period for pre-existing diseases?
faqs.answer: Pre-existing diseases will not be covered for 24 months.

faqs.question: What is the waiting period for specific ailments?
faqs.answer: 24 months waiting period is applicable on specific ailments.

faqs.question: What room categories are covered?
faqs.answer: You can pick any Room Category including Suite under inpatient hospitalization for Sum Insured ₹3 crores.

faqs.question: What is covered under pre-hospitalization?
faqs.answer: Medical expenses incurred up to 60 days before the date of hospitalization are covered.

faqs.question: What is covered under post-hospitalization?
faqs.answer: Medical expenses incurred post the date of discharge, up to 180 days after hospitalization are covered.

faqs.question: Is ambulance service covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, road ambulance cover for transport expenses incurred for ambulance to the hospital is included.

faqs.question: Are AYUSH treatments covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, medical expenses towards non-allopathic treatments including Ayurveda, Yoga & Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha, and Homeopathy are covered up to the limit of Sum Insured.

faqs.question: Is mental health covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, mental care cover is provided for medical expenses for conditions caused by or associated to mental illness, stress, anxiety, depression or medical conditions impacting mental health.

faqs.question: Is HIV/AIDS covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, HIV/AIDS & STD cover is provided for medical expenses for conditions caused by or associated to HIV or HIV related illnesses, including AIDS or AIDS Related Complex and sexually transmitted diseases.

faqs.question: What is domiciliary treatment coverage?
faqs.answer: Domiciliary expenses are covered for treatment of a disease, illness or injury at home on the advice of medical practitioner, under specific circumstances, up to 10% of Sum Insured.

faqs.question: Is day care treatment covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, medical expenses towards day care treatment or surgery that requires less than 24 hours of hospitalization are covered.

faqs.question: What is the adult health check-up benefit?
faqs.answer: Once per policy year, insured persons of 18 years or more can avail a comprehensive health check-up at the network starting from first policy year.

faqs.question: What is the premium waiver benefit?
faqs.answer: Upon occurrence of listed contingencies (Accidental death/Permanent Partial Disablement/Permanent Total Disablement/listed Critical Illnesses) to the Policyholder, waiver of one full year premium is provided.

faqs.question: What is the maternity coverage?
faqs.answer: Maternity expenses are covered up to ₹1 Lac for delivery, treatment of the new born baby, and first year's vaccinations, for up to 2 deliveries. Medically necessary termination of pregnancy is also covered.

faqs.question: Is infertility treatment covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, if hospitalized on Doctor's advice for Infertility Treatments, coverage is provided for a maximum of ₹2.5 Lacs, over and above the Maternity Sum Insured.

faqs.question: What is surrogacy cover?
faqs.answer: Medical expenses for a Surrogate Mother are covered up to ₹1 Lac, in case of medically necessary hospitalization for complications due to pregnancy through Surrogacy and Post-Partum Delivery.

faqs.question: What is worldwide medical emergency coverage?
faqs.answer: Medical expenses are covered worldwide, within the selected Area of Cover, for any medical emergency that leads to inpatient hospitalization or day care, including Global Post Hospitalisation and Global Road & Air Ambulance.

faqs.question: What are the age limits for entry?
faqs.answer: Minimum entry age: Child - 91 days, Adult - 18 years. Maximum entry age: Child - 25 years (in family floater), Adult - 65 years.

faqs.question: What policy periods are available?
faqs.answer: Policy periods of 1, 2 and 3 years are available.

faqs.question: What premium payment modes are available?
faqs.answer: Monthly, Quarterly, Half Yearly, Yearly, and Single payment modes are available. Premium loading will apply for Monthly, Quarterly and Half Yearly modes.

faqs.question: What is the grace period for premium payment?
faqs.answer: Grace period of 30 days for single yearly, half-yearly and quarterly mode of payment, and 15 days for monthly mode of payment.

faqs.question: What is the free-look period?
faqs.answer: A period of 30 days is provided to cancel the policy. Free look cancellation & refund will be made within 7 days from the date of receipt of request.

faqs.question: What discounts are available?
faqs.answer: Long term discount: 7.5% for 2 years and 10% for 3 years policy term. Loyalty discount: 5% from 4th to 7th policy year, 10% from 8th policy year onwards. Family discount: 15% for covering 2 or more family members. Online renewal discount: 3% p.a. through NACH or Standing Instruction.

faqs.question: Who can be covered under individual plan?
faqs.answer: Individual plan can be bought for self, lawfully wedded spouse, children, parents, siblings, parent in laws, grandparents & grandchildren, son in-law & daughter in-law, uncle, aunt, nephew & niece.

faqs.question: Who can be covered under floater plan?
faqs.answer: Floater plan can cover self, lawfully wedded spouse, children up to age 25 years, parents and parent in laws. Maximum of 2 adults and 3 children under single policy.

faqs.question: What is the cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: Policyholder may cancel by giving 7 days written notice and company shall refund premium for unexpired period. Company may cancel on grounds of misrepresentation, non-disclosure, fraud by giving 15 days written notice.

faqs.question: What is the air ambulance cover limit?
faqs.answer: Air ambulance cover is available up to ₹10 Lacs with maximum one event per policy year for expenses incurred on availing air ambulance services in India in case of emergency.

faqs.question: What is the medical devices and non-medical items coverage?
faqs.answer: Coverage is available up to ₹2 Lacs once in 3 policy years for expenses towards medical devices and non-medical items as prescribed by treating medical practitioner during or after hospitalization.

faqs.question: What cash benefits are available under optional packages?
faqs.answer: Major Illness Hospitalization Cash: ₹2,500 daily for up to 10 days. Chemotherapy/Radiotherapy Cash: ₹2,500 per sitting for up to 12 sittings per year. Accidental Hospitalization Cash: ₹2,500 daily for up to 10 days. Convalescence Benefit: ₹50,000 lump sum for 10+ consecutive days hospitalization.

faqs.question: What women-specific benefits are available?
faqs.answer: Breast Cancer Screening (annual mammography), Cervical Cancer Screening (annual pap smear), Cervical Cancer Vaccination (up to ₹2,500 per dose), Ovarian Cancer Screening (annual ultrasound and CA 125), Osteoporosis Screening (annual DEXA scan), up to 15 gynecological consultations, and up to 5 psychiatric/psychological consultations per year.

faqs.question: What is the continuity benefit?
faqs.answer: Continuity benefit on the entire Sum Insured is available for those with existing base Sum Insured (excluding cumulative bonus) of ₹10 lacs and above.
